calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared via zoom for Julia Murray (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated May 26. 1999 is admitted to probate. Julia E. Murray is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 2, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
